# After Dusk Events

> Private outdoor cinema rental in Southeast Michigan. 30-foot inflatable screen, concert-grade sound, veteran-owned. Serving 60 miles of Canton, MI — including Detroit, Ann Arbor, Plymouth, Northville, Novi, Birmingham, Royal Oak, Dearborn, and Grosse Pointe. BYO Content model (Netflix, Disney+, YouTube, PlayStation/Xbox, etc.). Honda generator plus Starlink for zero venue dependency. Insured. Private, non-ticketed events only — no public screenings or admission charges. Quote response within 24 hours.

## About

- [About After Dusk Events](https://afterduskevents.com/about): Veteran-owned, Canton MI. Owner-operator Blake. Operational philosophy and credentials.

## Packages

- [Packages overview](https://afterduskevents.com/packages): One 30 ft screen, three audio tiers — single speaker, two speakers, or two speakers plus Death From Below subwoofer.
- [Add-on catalog](https://afterduskevents.com/add-ons): Entertainment, concessions, atmosphere, comfort, seating, and service extensions.

## Pricing

- Every event is custom-quoted. No published price list. See the [cost guide](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/outdoor-movie-rental-cost-michigan) for typical ranges.

## Guides

- [How much does an outdoor movie rental cost in Michigan? (2026)](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/outdoor-movie-rental-cost-michigan): Typical price ranges by event type, what changes the price, deposit policy, travel fees, and FAQ.
- [What size outdoor movie screen do I need for my guest count? (2026)](https://afterduskevents.com/guides/screen-size-for-guest-count): Guest count to audio tier matching on one 30 ft screen.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- [Full FAQ](https://afterduskevents.com/faq): Travel distance, weather policy, power, WiFi, content licensing (BYO Content model), insurance, screen staking, audio coverage.

- [Get a quote](https://afterduskevents.com/contact): Form for inquiries. Response within 24 hours. Private events only — no ticketed or publicly advertised screenings.
